scope.summary: F-LOW G2: an empty base-object set no longer proves a FROM-bearing SELECT read-only on its own; the shortcut now also requires the parsed AST to carry no FROM/JOIN at any depth, and the proof is pinned by a test that fails when the new condition is deleted.
out_of_scope: No demonstrated fail-open was found: this is hardening of a proof the SideEffectOracle's trigger/VPD walk leans on, not a fix for an observed escape.
The default UnknownOracle baseline is unchanged; only a consumer that opted into with_statement_unknown_guarded observes the tightening.
Base-object collection itself is untouched; the change is to what an empty result is allowed to prove.

entry_points.name: classify SELECT arm / query_has_from_source
entry_points.trace: HOW A FAILURE WOULD BE DETECTED, decided before the test was written: `SELECT * FROM (SELECT 1 AS x) d` is a derived table with a real FROM source that resolves to ZERO base objects. Bound to a strict oracle it must be Guarded; if the shortcut ever fires for it again the assertion flips to Safe and the test dies. The test asserts BOTH detector preconditions explicitly (the query really has a FROM source, and really yields no base objects), so it cannot pass for the wrong reason if either half stops holding. MUTATION CONTROL: deleting `!query_has_from_source(query)` fails it with `left: Safe, right: Guarded`. query_has_from_source is separately unit-tested across eight shapes including CTEs, set operations and scalar subqueries.

limitations: 313 guard tests pass. The one failure, vector_embedding_batch_normalizes_only_for_parser_splitting, is PRE-EXISTING and unrelated: it fails identically in a pristine worktree at HEAD with none of these changes, having arrived with 6fa88203.
The tightening is proven at the classifier seam, not end to end through a live oracle: no engine-backed SideEffectOracle run is claimed.

Implemented and closed from a worktree because another pane holds uncommitted user_defined_calls work in classifier.rs in the shared checkout; that work was never touched and is unrelated to this function.
